cases.question: Send NeMo Relay runtime traces to an OTLP-compatible collector for production debugging.
cases.ground_truth: Use the OTEL export skill to configure an OpenTelemetry subscriber/exporter, register it before scoped work, attach useful metadata, flush, and verify spans arrive.
expected_behavior: Configure and register the OTEL subscriber before scoped work
Attach useful scope, tool, LLM, and model metadata
Flush or shut down deterministically and verify exported spans

cases.question: My backend expects OpenInference LLM span semantics.
